items.quote: his wrestling, too, is very underrated.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is a better striker than Merab Dvalishvili.
items.quote: Sandhagen's a better striker than Bautista.

items.claim: Merab Dvalishvili is dangerous because he consistently steals rounds.
items.quote: what Bautista does is really dangerous in terms of he can he'll just steal rounds against you against you constantly.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's striking defense is flawed because he keeps his chin in the air.
items.quote: I'm concerned about Paddy on the feet. He still sticks his chin up in the air.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is physically very strong for the lightweight division.
items.quote: I think Paddy's quite strong for 155, man.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's wrestling is not elite and he has been out-wrestled in previous fights.
items.quote: I know Paddy's pure wrestling is not great and we've seen him kind of out wrestled in a couple fights.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has lost three of his last four fights.
items.quote: Conor McGregor, who has been a loser in three of his last four fights

items.claim: Max Holloway did not put on weight correctly for his move up to 170 pounds.
items.quote: I don't think he put on the weight the right way.
